name: vibelabs-plugins
description: Vibe Labs Claude Code plugins — AI assistant spawner, Instagram analysis, stakeholder simulation, and more

plugins.name: assistant-spawner
plugins.description: Spawn a new AI executive assistant with Telegram bot, heartbeat, and memory system. Guided conversational setup via /spawn-assistant.

plugins.name: instaskill
plugins.description: Turn your Instagram saved posts into a searchable, analyzable archive. Sync, analyze, deep dive, and extract structured data from video.

plugins.name: github-multi-account
plugins.description: Auto-check and switch GitHub accounts before git push. Prevents 'Repository not found' errors when working with repos across multiple GitHub accounts.

plugins.name: stakeholder-sim
plugins.description: Stakeholder reaction simulation for PR and marketing. Industry-agnostic — researches the sender, maps stakeholders, and builds a persona cast per run (or loads a preset library). Spawns persona subagents in parallel, critic-passes each reaction, synthesizes consensus/disagreement/surprise signals, verifies every quote, and renders executive-grade deliverables: markdown report, crisis-PR-agency PDF, and McKinsey-style PowerPoint board deck. Fully agentic pipeline. Ships with an Aker BioMarine sample preset.

plugins.name: pre-flight
plugins.description: Pre-publication stakeholder reaction simulation. Mode-routed: pressure-tests a statement, press release, positioning deck, earnings script, M&A announcement, comment letter, or rebrand narrative against a dynamically-researched cast. Scopes via AskUserQuestion, composes the run from 12 modes grounded in real PR practice (crisis pre-flight, tabletop, launch pre-mortem, regulatory response, deal comms, earnings rehearsal, positioning pressure test, counterfactual compare, red-team read, activist-proxy, exec-transition, internal-first), and emits a mode-keyed report plus canonical artifacts (holding statement, Q&A doc, message house, stakeholder heat map, day-1/30/100 plan). Persona bundles built per run with interview-grade fidelity (Park et al. 2024) — verbatim signature quotes, forbidden phrases, multi-lens expert reflection.

plugins.name: tone-of-voice
plugins.description: Universal tone-of-voice and anti-AI writing principles. Layers with project-specific tone/ files. Bootstraps new projects on demand.

plugins.name: cmux
plugins.description: Spawn and drive Claude Code (or any) sessions inside the cmux app from a Claude session — create/reuse workspaces, open tabs rooted in a folder, send keystrokes, and read terminal output over the cmux CLI. Works out of the box on any machine with cmux + Claude Code.
